name: Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Quickly cook the bean sprouts, stirring constantly, until just tender.
3. Add mushrooms, water chestnuts, and bamboo shoots; cook about 2 minutes more.
4. Stir in meat, shrimp, green onions, salt, pepper, soy sauce, and sugar.
5. Remove from heat and let cool.
6. Place about 2 tablespoons of the filling in the center of an egg roll skin.
7. Fold the two opposite ends over the filling.
8. Brush the other two edges with beaten egg.
9. Roll up tightly into a log shape.
10. Heat oil in a deep pot or skillet as needed for frying.
11. Fry the egg rolls until golden brown, turning occasionally for even browning.
12. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels before serving.
